text:
Delays Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
null/missing
OTHDEL_MEDICAID Other Developmental Delays Indicator - Medicaid-Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having Other Developmental Delays Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
OTHDEL_MEDICARE Other
